meta.source: Curated from DOLA HNA tracker + Prop 123 commitment filings + city websites + news search
meta.scope: Top 33 CO jurisdictions by LIHTC activity / population (May 2026)

fields_documented.hna: Housing Needs Assessment status. 'current' = within 3 yrs (qualifies for Prop 123 fast-track), 'in_progress' = adopted commitment but no doc yet, 'stale' = older than 3 yrs, 'none' = none on file. Year is the most recent HNA/strategy adoption year.
fields_documented.land_banking: City-owned land or community-land-trust program for affordable housing. 'active' = operational program/recipient, 'planning' = in study/planning, 'none' = no documented program.
fields_documented.dedicated_income: Dedicated local revenue stream (housing trust fund, dedicated sales tax, lodging tax, marijuana tax, linkage fee, STR tax). 'active' = currently funding affordable housing, 'planning' = under evaluation, 'none' = none beyond state/federal pass-through.
fields_documented.tap_fee_reduction: Reduced or waived system development charges / impact fees / tap fees for income-restricted units. 'active' = documented program, 'planning' = under evaluation, 'unknown' = unverified (note: tap fees are often charged by water districts, not cities, so a city 'unknown' may not be the right unit of analysis), 'none' = explicitly no program.

meta.confidence_legend: high = specific named program with primary-source URL; medium = corroborated but with gaps; low/unknown = best-guess based on broad indicators
